ItacPersonItem.Notes: Famous for his `mezzotinto` plates. See Bryan, Dictionary of painters and engravers, etc. (1849). In `Ritratti` (1697), he signs one engraving as devised in `Aug. Vind. 1693`, presumably Augusta Vindelicorum (Augsburg).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
